compiled_state.title: CI: ticket ghost/fsck e2e tests return NOT_FOUND instead of expected status
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: 3 test failures in test-ticket-list-transition-comment-e2e.sh: ghost ticket returns NOT_FOUND instead of status=error with error=reducer_failed. Corrupt CREATE event returns NOT_FOUND instead of status=fsck_needed. Reducer may not be handling edge cases.
